title: Modern Gold A4 Photo Frame for A4 (21 x 29.7cm) Photos or Pictures, Plexi Glass, Freestanding or Wall Mounted Landscape or Portrait
features: A modern Gold picture frame with an elegant gloss finish and sleek 9.8x16.5mm (Width, Depth) profile.
This photo frame is designed to hold an A4 (21x29.7cm) photo or picture. The overall size of the frame is approximately 32x23cm

Create gallery displays with multiple frames. Think of Family photo collections, memory walls, or a collection of jaw-dropping iconic black-and-white pictures. A fantastic picture frame for your home, office, or as a gift.
Crystal clear and shatter-resistant Plexiglass front. A protective film is applied on both sides – remember to remove the film before use.
Wall-mounted or freestanding. This picture frame has an MDF back panel with pre-attached landscape or portrait orientation hangers and an MDF frame easel for tabletop display.
